title: Michel Raimbaud – In Syria and elsewhere, against the war party and the law of the jungle, ...
description:
"In Syria and elsewhere, against the war party and the law of the jungle, rebuild peace in accordance with law"

Michel Raimbaud – Former French ambassador particularly in the Arab world, in Africa and Latin America. Former Director of the French Office of Protection of Refugees and Stateless Persons (OFPRA)
